data.title: Microservices Integration
data.description: Use microservices architecture to handle different AI models and services efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Decompose into independent deployable units communicating via REST APIs or message queues.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Leverage cloud platforms for dynamic scaling of resources as per demand.
data.technical_spec: Utilize container orchestration platforms like Kubernetes on AWS, Azure, or GCP.

data.title: Data Storage Optimization
data.description: Implement robust data management systems for fast retrieval and processing.
data.technical_spec: Utilize distributed databases and caching strategies for performance.

data.title: APIs Standardization
data.description: Standardize API endpoints for seamless integration with external services.
data.technical_spec: Follow RESTful conventions with OpenAPI specifications for documentation.

data.title: Redundant Systems
data.description: Implement redundancy for critical components to ensure high availability.
data.technical_spec: Use load balancers and replicated data stores for failover.
